name: Tzvi Kantor
title: UX Writer
subtitle: AI Content Systems
tagline: Full-stack wordsmith with 10+ years across UX writing, content design, technical writing, marketing, grants, and AI-assisted content systems.
bio: Full-stack wordsmith with 10+ years across UX writing, content design, technical writing, marketing, grants, and AI-assisted content systems.
about:
I've spent my career turning product complexity into language people trust. From knowledge base systems at Wix to enterprise security UX at CyberArk, I've worked where words carry real weight.

My work lives at the intersection of product, design, and strategy — building content systems that scale with products and stay true to the people using them.

I care about craft. I care about precision. And I believe good writing is good thinking.
